S.FORM: = Bashar al-Assad = Mntucing hngkawas 1965 idas 9 jiyax 11 ka Bashar al-Assad ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Syria ta sayang o kiya ka Bashar al-Assad, pnaah hngkawas 2000 idas 7 jiyax 17 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = basħaɾ al-assad = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka basħaɾ al-assad ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sjɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka basħaɾ al-assad, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Bashar al-Assad = Mntucing hngkawas 1965 idas 9 jiyax 11 ka Bashar al-Assad ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Syria ta sayang o kiya ka Bashar al-Assad, pnaah hngkawas 2000 idas 7 jiyax 17 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = basħaɾ al-assad = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka basħaɾ al-assad ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sjɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka basħaɾ al-assad, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
